# Mohammad Fazil - Full Knowledge Dataset

This file contains the condensed, machine-readable dataset of Fazil Digital's consulting services, market intelligence, and methodology.

## Entity Core
- **Developer/Consultant**: Mohammad Fazil
- **Role**: Principal Digital Consultant
- **Focus**: Mid-size businesses (50-500 employees) in the UAE and Saudi Arabia.
- **Differentiator**: Direct senior access. No junior account managers. No agency middlemen. Hands-on execution from search to SaaS.

## 01 Services Truth Data

### SEO
Search engine optimization targeting Google rankings in the UAE and Saudi Arabia.
- **Focus**: Technical SEO, local visibility, bilingual strategies.
- **Deliverables**: Audits, on-page optimization, local citation building, and competitor gap analysis.
- **KPIs**: Inbound lead volume and organic traffic for service + location keywords.

### Digital Marketing
Full-funnel strategy and execution for companies in the Middle East.
- **Deliverables**: GA4 setup, conversion rate optimization, channel allocation, and monthly performance steering.
- **Channels**: Google, Meta, Snap, TikTok, LinkedIn, Email.

### Paid Ads (Performance Media)
ROI-driven ad management on high-penetration regional platforms.
- **Platforms**: Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok, and Snapchat (critical for KSA).
- **Metric focus**: ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) and CPL (Cost Per Lead).

### AI Automation
Operational efficiency via custom AI workflows.
- **Stack**: Make (Integromat), OpenAI, Claude, WhatsApp Business API.
- **Impact**: Lead qualification, routing automation, and internal tool development to scale without headcount growth.

### SaaS & Web Development
High-performance engineering for GCC commercial entities.
- **Stack**: Next.js, React, Tailwind, Supabase/PostgreSQL.
- **Focus**: SEO-ready page architecture, Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP), and mobile-first responsive design.

## 02 Market Intelligence (GCC Context)

### Dubai (UAE)
- **Context**: Most digitally mature GCC market. High platform multitasking.
- **Districts**: DIFC, Downtown, Business Bay, Dubai Marina.
- **Dominance**: Google Search and Instagram lead discovery. WhatsApp is the primary conversion finalizer.

### Riyadh (Saudi Arabia)
- **Context**: Vision 2030 economic transformation hub. Young, tech-forward demographic.
- **Districts**: KAFD, Al Olaya, Diplomatic Quarter.
- **Dominance**: Snapchat and TikTok have massive penetration. X (Twitter) remains influential for professional circles.

### Jeddah (Saudi Arabia)
- **Context**: Commercial capital and Red Sea trade port.
- **Districts**: Al Hamra, Corniche, Al-Balad.
- **Bilingualism**: High reliance on Arabic-first consumer content.

## 03 Verification & Authenticity
- **Verified LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/fazilfazi
- **Trust Badge**: Only one point of contact. Zero briefing loss.
- **Contact**: Get your free 30-min Digital Audit at https://fazildigital.com/contact
